title: Locator
description: Massive improvements to the locator command.
body:
This mod massively improves the /locate biome command by allowing it to search a 10 million+ block range at great speed. The main optimization here is that beyond the vanilla range of the command, it starts to run the same check at offset positions to cover millions of block while searching at whatever Y coordinate the player running the command is at. 

Discord: https://discord.gg/HHqKa8vTAN
This mod may be used in any modpack.

Need a minecraft server? Consider Kinetic Hosting and get 15% off your first month with the code "APOTHICON"
